strengths: 15+ years of polyglot full-stack and distributed-systems experience across fintech-adjacent domains
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role
Strong software craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, observability
concerns: No demonstrated experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or holding executive/CTO-level leadership
Limited evidence of production multi-agent AI systems at scale; agentic work appears recent and tooling-focused
Fintech exposure is tangential (investment platform, pricing) rather than credit-risk, working-capital, or real-time trade decisioning

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and low-latency backend depth

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior/staff engineer with broad full-stack, distributed-systems, and craftsmanship credentials, plus early exposure to agentic AI tooling at re:cinq. However, the role demands an executive who has already built and governed multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech and scaled engineering organizations to 30+, and the resume shows individual-contributor and small-team senior roles rather than CTO-level leadership, with only tangential fintech and nascent agentic-AI production experience.
